title: ugetames
text: ugetames Get the complete, unfiltered asynchronous message from the input queue. Explain this code short ugetames (unsigned char* message) Copy Parameters message Asynchronous message data. This buffer must be large enough to hold the largest expected message. (Output) Return Values The length of the message or -1 if there is no message. -1 can occur in the following circumstances: A procedure invokes ugetames when there is no asynchronous message being processed. No text was supplied with the message. The receiveMessage trigger requests other user input (for example, with an askmess instruction) before activating the 3GL procedure containing ugetames . The application is in ProcScript debug mode before ugetames . Use Library: yrtl Description ugetames copies the complete data of an asynchronous message into the specified buffer. This function is primarily useful when the message contains non-printable ASCII characters which are stripped out when moved to $result . Note: You should use ugetames only in a 3GL routine that was called from the receiveMessage trigger. Related Links uputames Put an asynchronous message in the input queue of the calling application.
